kpis.name: Defending 1v1 %
kpis.description: Percentage of successful attempts to prevent an opposing player in possession of the ball to dribble past the player.

kpis.name: Defensive actions
kpis.description: Number of successful defensive actions (defensive duels, tackles, interceptions, recoveries, clearances) adjusted by the opponent's possession.

kpis.name: Possessions won
kpis.description: Number of recovered possessions adjusted by the opponent's possession.

kpis.name: Tackle success %
kpis.description: Percentage of defending 1v1s and sliding tackles won.
